executive_strategic_insight.core_theme: Launching automated web application testing as natural extension of EASM discovery
executive_strategic_insight.strategic_focus: CyCognito added DAST-like automated web application testing to their EASM platform. Find the asset, then automatically test it for vulnerabilities — closing the discovery-to-validation loop.
executive_strategic_insight.ecosystem_momentum: 7 integrations added including Jira ticketing, Azure Sentinel, and custom webhook support.
executive_strategic_insight.persona_shift: AppSec teams alongside traditional EASM security operations buyers
executive_strategic_insight.pricing_model_shift: Web app testing as add-on module to base EASM subscription

engineering_capacity.velocity_assessment: High — aggressive feature expansion into adjacent categories

intelligence_signals.job_board_signals: Hiring web security researchers and AppSec engineers — confirms web app testing investment
intelligence_signals.target_users: Security operations and application security teams
intelligence_signals.monetization_approach: Module-based expansion revenue from existing EASM customers
intelligence_signals.differentiators: Discover + test in one platform without needing separate DAST tools

gaps_exposed: No integrated DAST/web app testing in Sentry EASM
areas_of_focus: Add basic web app testing to Sentry EASM

product_specific.Sentry (EASM): CyCognito's DAST addition makes their EASM significantly more actionable than Sentry's current passive scanning
